underlying_goal: Build, debug, and fix issues in a Flutter pet-tracking app including compilation errors, database type mismatches, and UI image display problems
friction_detail: Flutter was not in PATH of the sandboxed shell, causing initial compilation attempts to fail.
brief_summary: User needed to compile their Flutter app, diagnose runtime errors, fix a Supabase column type mismatch, and fix missing pet images in UI cards — Claude successfully identified and resolved each issue.
